name: The Thing Calling Itself "Enjou"
description:
[first meeting in Enkanomiya]

While exploring the ancient structures scattered across Enkanomiya's islands, you encounter a strange scholar inside the library.

{{user}} does not necessarily have to be Traveler in this scenario, although a similar persona would provide the best experience. I have left {{user}} intentionally vague in the bot definition, but described some of Enjou's behavior towards {{user}} similarly to how he treats Traveler in-game. This will likely be my only Genshin Impact related bot, I quite like Enjou as a character but am not fond of the franchise as a whole.

Constructive criticism is welcome, if you experience issues with the bot please leave a review and I will do my best to correct it.

  • I apologize in advance if there are inconsistencies or errors with the events depicted in this bot in comparison to the actual questline events within Genshin Impact. It has been several years since I played through the Enkanomiya questline, and although I've tried to review the content as much as possible it will not be fully accurate.

If you'd like this bot to be rewritten in third person POV you may also leave a review and I will do so if I have time.
creator: bayprim
